title: ADR-0002 re-implemented after full workspace reset (2026-05-27 ~15:30, 24 tests green)
content: Another full-reset run for local-seo-agency: src/lib held only cn.ts+format.ts, package.json had NO test script and NO tsx devDep, ADR-0001 test files wiped (only docs/adr/ADR-0001 survived). Re-implemented ADR-0002 from the settled decision: slug.ts (slugify ASCII-only), num.ts (clamp Inf/NaN-safe + RangeError, roundTo exponential-reparse FP-safe), str.ts (truncate ellipsis-budgeted, titleCase whitespace-preserving), colocated *.test.ts, no cross-imports. My 3 modules = 24 tests (7 slug + 10 num + 7 str). Added tsx@^4.22.3 + `test` script. 24/24 green ~215ms Node v24.12.0, tsc clean. Confirms recurring intermittent-reset pattern: ALWAYS verify the tree (ls src/lib + package.json scripts/devDeps) before trusting 'implemented' memory; suite total is 24 when ADR-0001 tests absent, ~42 when present — read the actual # tests line.
